div.p: This signal handler setup enables the init process (PID 1) to properly reap zombie child processes. Without this, terminated container processes would remain as zombies consuming system resources.
When SIGCHLD is received, sigchld_handler calls waitpid(-1, NULL, WNOHANG) in a loop to reap all terminated children without blocking.

text.tspan: → Only receive SIGCHLD on child termination
→ Kernel invokes sigchld_handler on child exit
